case_title: CHASE BANK USA, N.A., A CORPORATION VS. ERNEST J. ROGERS et al

docket_entries.description: DECLARATION RE: CCP 1033 FILED BY PLAINTIFF CHASE BANK USA, N.A., A CORPORATION

UNDER APPLICATION TO THE CLERK FOR JUDGMENT UNDER SEC 585(1) C.C.P., IT IS ADJUDGED THAT PLAINTIFF CHASE BANK USA, N.A., A CORPORATION RECOVER FROM DEFENDANT ROGERS, ERNEST J. $2,217.95 PRINCIPAL, $63.20 INTEREST, $258.00 COSTS, TOTAL JUDGMENT $2,539.15, SEE SCANNED DOCUMENT

EXEMPT COLLECTIONS (RULE 3.740), COMPLAINT FILED BY PLAINTIFF CHASE BANK USA, N.A., A CORPORATION AS TO DEFENDANT ROGERS, ERNEST J. DOES 1 TO 10 SUMMONS ISSUED, JUDICIAL COUNCIL CIVIL CASE COVER SHEET FILED PROOF OF SERVICE DUE ON                  JUL-06-2010

SUMMONS ON COMPLAINT, PROOF OF SERVICE ONLY, FILED BY PLAINTIFF CHASE BANK USA, N.A., A CORPORATION SERVED JAN-10-2010, PERSONAL SERVICE AS TO DEFENDANT ROGERS, ERNEST J.
REQUEST FOR ENTRY OF DEFAULT/DEFAULT ENTERED, CLERK'S JUDGMENT REQUESTED, DECLARATION OF NON-MILITARY STATUS, COST BILL $258.00 FILED, CREDIT ACKNOWLEDGED $.00 AS TO DEFENDANT ROGERS, ERNEST J.
DECLARATION OF KEVIN FLETCHER RE: CCP 585 - IN SUPPORT OF DEFAULT JUDGMENT. FILED BY PLAINTIFF CHASE BANK USA, N.A., A CORPORATION
DISMISSAL WITHOUT PREJUDICE OF COMPLAINT AS TO DEFENDANT DOES 1 TO 10
